title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 10 - The White Dwarf Issues (b)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zI6L_SkYqkU

Daniel (@dungeondive) continues through the White Dwarf issues with the second instalment of magazine coverage. More warriors, more scenarios, more of the community-sustaining content that kept Warhammer Quest players engaged long after the game left shop shelves.

The pace of the White Dwarf series picks up as Daniel works through multiple issues, highlighting the standout content and noting which articles are essential reading versus curiosity pieces. The curation is the value here — someone's done the digging so you don't have to.

----

Do you think magazine-based expansions were better or worse for games than the modern DLC/expansion pack model?
